MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearances: Felicia Reid, Esq. of Curiale, Hirschfeld, Kraemer, 415-835-9024 for plaintiff and moving party Patricia Block
Steven Morris, Esq. of Morris & Assoc., 619-239-1300 for defendant and opposing party Wyndham Vacation Resorts, Inc.

Joseph Liburt, Esq. of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe, 650-614-7447 for defendant and opposing party Wyndham Vacation Resorts, Inc.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court VACATED its tentative ruling AND GRANTED PLAINTIFF PATRICIA BLOCK's Joint Motion To Dismiss Allegations Without Prejudice And To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Individual Claims With Prejudice. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
